turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Enquiring About a Rental Property or Housing Inspection

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: I want to practise making enquiries about rental properties and housing inspections. You are a property manager or real estate agent at a real estate agency. I will play the role of a potential tenant. Please create a realistic and professional interaction, either in person, by phone, or by email, depending on how the conversation develops.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, happy to help. Are you looking to rent or buy?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Hello, I'm looking for Terent.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Great, renting it is! Now, can you tell me what kind of property you're interested in? For example, are you looking for an apartment, a house, or maybe a townhouse?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Anything will be great. I'm interested in the two-bedroom unit near the Central Station.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, that helps! So a two-bedroom near the central station is what you're after. Now, just to get a sense of your timeline, when are you hoping to move in?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “As soon as possible, please.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Got it! As soon as possible is definitely doable. Now, do you have a particular budget range in mind for the rent?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “And there will be 700 weekly maximum.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Absolutely, that gives me a good idea. So around 700 weekly max. Now, do you have any must-have features in mind, like parking or a pet-friendly place?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “No parking place would be okay, but we have a dock.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure, that’s helpful to know. So we’ll focus on pet-friendly options. Now, do you have any preference about how long of a lease you’d like to sign?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Of all these, I'd like to say...”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Absolutely, that makes sense. So let's figure out the lease length. Are you thinking of something like a six-month lease, a year, or maybe even longer?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “I think that'll be 10 months to a year.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, that sounds good. So somewhere around ten months to a year is your ideal range. Now, just so we can match you up better, do you have a preferred move-in date, like a specific day or week?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “We're available from next week.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Perfect, that’s pretty soon. So we’ll aim for something available from next week. And just to wrap things up, do you have any questions for me about the process or about viewing the property?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Are there any inspection times this week?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Absolutely! We do have some inspection slots later this week. So let me know which day works best for you, and we can set that up.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Then I'd like to have inspections like more than three houses.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure, that’s totally fine. We can arrange inspections for a few different places. Now, is there a particular day this week when you’d like to see those three homes?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Any time will be okay.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, that’s easy enough. We’ll just pick a convenient time and line up those three inspections for you. And with that, I think we’re all set to get you scheduled. Anything else you want to know before we wrap up?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Actually, me and my boyfriend are on our working holiday vacation, so which documentation do we have to bring?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure, that’s good to know. So for a working holiday situation, you'll usually just need your IDs and proof of income or visa details. We'll go over that together. And if you’re all set, we’ll get those inspections locked in for you!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “We consider the soundproof and the water pressure is really important for us.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Absolutely, I get that. We’ll definitely keep an eye on soundproofing and water pressure when we look at those places. So thanks for mentioning that. And I think we’ve got everything we need. If that’s all set, just let me know and we’ll wrap it up!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “How long does it take to hear back from you?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Usually not long at all. We’ll confirm those inspection times within a day or so. So you’ll hear back from us pretty quickly. Anything else on your mind?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “All good. Perfect.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Perfect! Then we’re all set. I’ll get everything arranged and you’ll hear from us soon. Thanks for reaching out, and we’ll see you at the inspections!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “I have a question. If someone else also applies for the house that I like, how do you choose?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure! That’s a common question. Basically, we look at all applications and choose the most suitable tenant based on things like references and rental history. But we’ll definitely keep you in the loop. Anything else you’d like to know?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “have to pay for the heat and gas or for the water in this.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Absolutely, good question.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “are separate from the rental fee.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure! Typically, yes, those utilities are separate from the rental fee, so you'll just pay for gas, water, and heating as you go. And if you need any more details on that, just ask!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Actually, we don't have any rental histories in Australia. Can I still apply?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Of course! You can definitely still apply. We often help people who are new and just arriving. We’ll just look at other documents like proof of income or references from your home country. Anything else on your mind?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “If we can get references from my home country, then would that be bad for us?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Not at all! That's actually really helpful. If you can get references from back home, that'll definitely work in your favor. So feel free to gather those, and we’ll include them with your application. Anything else you’re curious about?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “I mean, I mean if we can't.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Ah, I see what you mean! If you can't get references from home, that's okay too. We can still work with other documents, like proof of income or even a letter from your current employer. So don't worry, we can definitely find a way. Anything else on your mind?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “I think that's it for today. Thank you so much.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: You're very welcome! I'm glad I could help. If you need anything else, just let me know. Take care!
